# SLO and Error Budget

## Purpose
Use this skill to assess reliability targets, burn rates, and policy decisions.

## Triggers
- "slo breach"
- "error budget burn"
- "reliability target"

## Outputs
- SLO status assessment
- Burn-rate interpretation
- Risk level
- Recommended reliability policy action

## Example Prompts
- "Our 30-day availability SLO is 99.9 and we burned 40 percent in 2 days. What now?"
- "Interpret this burn-rate alert and recommend if we should freeze releases."
